Tests for the Math.sin function with various inputs including NaN, zero, and infinity.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.16-001.js](15.08.02.16-001.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.sin(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.
- **[15.08.02.16-002.js](15.08.02.16-002.js.md)**: Tests if the reciprocal of Math.sin(+0) equals Infinity.
- **[15.08.02.16-003.js](15.08.02.16-003.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Math.sin function with negative zero input.
- **[15.08.02.16-004.js](15.08.02.16-004.js.md)**: Tests that the sine of infinity is NaN using the Math.sin function.
- **[15.08.02.16-005.js](15.08.02.16-005.js.md)**: Tests that the sine of negative infinity is NaN using an assertion.
